title: Coupa Purchase Order
description: Schema representing a Coupa purchase order, which is a commitment to purchase goods or services from a supplier. Based on the Coupa Core API purchase orders resource as documented at compass.coupa.com.

id.description: Coupa unique internal identifier for the purchase order.

po-number.description: Purchase order number. May be auto-generated by Coupa or provided externally.

status.description: Current status of the purchase order in its lifecycle.

type.description: Order type classification. ExternalOrderHeader for externally created purchase orders.

version.description: PO supplier version number. Increments when revisions are sent to the supplier.

internal-revision.description: Internal revision number. Increases each time a change is made to the purchase order.

change-type.description: Indicates the last modification method applied to the purchase order.

confirmation_status.description: Current confirmation state from the supplier.

acknowledged-flag.description: Indicates whether the purchase order has been acknowledged by the supplier.

acknowledged-at.description: Timestamp when the purchase order was acknowledged by the supplier.

total.description: Total monetary amount of the purchase order, calculated from order lines.

currency.description: Transaction currency for the purchase order.

supplier.description: The supplier (vendor) associated with this purchase order.

supplier-site.description: Specific supplier site or location for the order.

requester.description: The user who requested the purchase order.

ship-to-address.description: Delivery destination address for the ordered goods or services.

ship-to-attention.description: Recipient contact name at the shipping address.

ship-to-user.description: Designated user to receive the goods.

payment-term.description: Payment schedule terms for the purchase order.

payment-method.description: Payment processing method for the order.

shipping-term.description: Shipping and delivery terms for the purchase order.

order-lines.description: Collection of line items on the purchase order.

requisition-header.description: Reference to the source requisition that generated this purchase order.

id.description: Coupa unique identifier of the source requisition.

invoice-stop.description: When true, invoicing is blocked for this purchase order.

exported.description: Indicates whether the purchase order has been exported to an external system (e.g., ERP).

last-exported-at.description: Timestamp when the purchase order was last exported.

hide-price.description: Supplier-facing price visibility control. When true, prices are hidden from the supplier.

price-hidden.description: Indicates whether pricing is currently hidden from the supplier.

transmission-method-override.description: Override for the default PO transmission method to the supplier.

transmission-status.description: Current delivery/transmission status of the purchase order.

transmission-emails.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses used for PO transmission.

coupa-accelerate-status.description: Status indicating whether the associated invoice has discount payment terms.

confirm-by-hrs.description: Number of hours the supplier has to confirm the purchase order.

attachments.description: File attachments linked to the purchase order.

milestones.description: Procurement milestone markers associated with the purchase order.

pcard.description: Purchasing card reference for the order.

created-at.description: Timestamp when the purchase order was created. Automatically set by Coupa.

updated-at.description: Timestamp when the purchase order was last updated. Automatically set by Coupa.

created-by.description: The user who created the purchase order.

updated-by.description: The user who last updated the purchase order.

id.description: Coupa unique identifier for the user.

SupplierReference.description: Reference to a supplier (vendor) in Coupa.

id.description: Coupa unique identifier for the supplier.

SupplierSiteReference.description: Reference to a supplier site or location.

id.description: Coupa unique identifier for the supplier site.
Coupa unique identifier for the currency.

AddressReference.description: Reference to a physical address in Coupa.

id.description: Coupa unique identifier for the address.

PaymentTermReference.description: Reference to a payment term definition.

id.description: Coupa unique identifier for the payment term.

ShippingTermReference.description: Reference to a shipping term definition.

id.description: Coupa unique identifier for the shipping term.

OrderLine.description: A line item on a purchase order representing a specific good or service being ordered.

id.description: Coupa unique identifier for the order line.

description.description: Description of the item or service.

code.description: Unit of measure code (e.g., EA, CS, BX).

need-by-date.description: Date by which the item is needed.

commodity.description: Commodity classification for the line item.

account.description: Chart of accounts reference for cost allocation.

status.description: Current status of the order line.

created-at.description: Timestamp when the line was created.

updated-at.description: Timestamp when the line was last updated.

id.description: Coupa unique identifier for the attachment.
Coupa unique identifier for the milestone.
